message:
state: add comprehensive ensemble store tests (bd-17kn3)

Cover all EnsembleStore CRUD operations: save/get/update/delete/list
for both EnsembleSession and ModeAssignment. Uses file-backed SQLite
to avoid in-memory connection isolation with nested queries.

State package coverage: 73.5% → 84.8%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
